_comment: QuantaFoundry cross-model golden-authoring intents. Author U[out,in] (2^n_sys square, complex) from the standard definition, big-endian (first register = MSB; first register = control for controlled gates). See RUNTIME-BRIEF.md. Round A = calibration (answer known), Round B = establishment (no answer key).

convention.controlled_gates: first register = control, last register = target

intents.name: CNOT (controlled-X)
intents.definition: Two-qubit controlled-NOT. Control = first register. Flips target (second register) iff control is |1>.

intents.name: SWAP
intents.definition: Two-qubit SWAP. Exchanges the two qubits: |ab> -> |ba>.

intents.name: Toffoli (CCNOT)
intents.definition: Three-qubit doubly-controlled NOT. Controls = first two registers, target = third. Flips target iff both controls are |1>.

intents.name: QFT on 2 qubits
intents.definition: Quantum Fourier Transform on 2 qubits. U[j,k] = (1/sqrt(N)) * exp(2*pi*i*j*k/N), N=4, j,k in 0..3, big-endian integer indexing. No output bit-reversal (raw QFT matrix).

intents.name: QFT on 3 qubits
intents.definition: Quantum Fourier Transform on 3 qubits. U[j,k] = (1/sqrt(N)) * exp(2*pi*i*j*k/N), N=8, big-endian integer indexing. No output bit-reversal (raw QFT matrix).

intents.name: Controlled-Z (CZ)
intents.definition: Two-qubit controlled-Z. Applies a -1 phase iff both qubits are |1>. Symmetric, diagonal: diag(1,1,1,-1).

intents.name: Controlled-S
intents.definition: Two-qubit controlled-S. Control = first register. Applies S (diag(1,i)) to target iff control is |1>. Diagonal: diag(1,1,1,i).

intents.name: CCZ (doubly-controlled Z)
intents.definition: Three-qubit doubly-controlled Z. Applies a -1 phase iff all three qubits are |1>. Symmetric, diagonal: diag(1,1,1,1,1,1,1,-1).

intents.name: QFT on 4 qubits
intents.definition: Quantum Fourier Transform on 4 qubits. U[j,k] = (1/sqrt(N)) * exp(2*pi*i*j*k/N), N=16, big-endian integer indexing. No output bit-reversal (raw QFT matrix).
